message:
fix: improve daemon robustness with timeouts, logging, and cache bounds

- hook: replace silent error suppression in TimingHistory::save_to_disk
  with warn!() logging for diagnosability
- hook: add connect/read timeouts to send_telemetry and send_test_run
  so they never block the hook indefinitely
- daemon: add 10s read timeouts to telemetry and test-run body reads
  in handle_connection to prevent hung connections
- selection: bound CacheTracker::last_success_by_project to 200 entries
  with LRU eviction to prevent unbounded memory growth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
